title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Denjiro, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Hiyori, Unknown person #15, Kinemon as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It would be an honor shown Crochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take care of and be in charge of everything you need.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That guy is amazing who is that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He is so sharp and skilled!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Is now protected by the Kyoshiro family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He must party through the night!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He stole the money from my safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss, this pretty little girl was wandering in front of the shops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think it's an orphan that got mixed into the city.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You may not recognize me but..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's what happened with you and Kawamatsu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My appearance was changed by a monster called 'Rage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even Kinemon and the others probably won't recognize me, but that's better!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please do not let anyone even in our Allies know that it's me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will protect you instead of Kawamatsu for now.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
